neo4j-memory.rationale: Native Docker catalog server for semantic memory (Neo4j graph). SUPERSEDES versioned knowledge nodes. Replaces allura-brain's graph operations.

database-server.rationale: Native Docker catalog server for episodic memory (PostgreSQL). Append-only event traces and vector embeddings. Replaces allura-brain's SQL operations.

neo4j-cypher.rationale: Native Docker catalog server for ad-hoc Cypher queries. Debug and diagnostic use only; not required for normal memory operations.
